title: Severability
doc_html:
§776. Severability

            If any provision of this Part is held invalid, or if its application to any person or circumstance is held invalid, such invalidity does not affect other provisions or applications which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application.

            Acts 2022, No. 712, §1.
doc_text:
§776.  Severability
If any provision of this Part is held invalid, or if its application to any person or
circumstance is held invalid, such invalidity does not affect other provisions or applications
which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application.
Acts 2022, No. 712, §1.
